concepts.name: already performed
concepts.description: Definition:The requested action has already been performed and so this request has no effect

concepts.name: end too late alert
concepts.description: Definition:Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective because the end of administration is too close to another planned therapy.

concepts.name: start too late alert
concepts.description: Definition:Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective because the start of administration is too late after the onset of the condition.

concepts.name: drug action detected issue
concepts.description: Description:Proposed therapy may be contraindicated or ineffective based on an existing or recent drug therapy.

concepts.name: Drug Interaction Alert
concepts.description: Proposed therapy may interact with an existing or recent drug therapy

concepts.name: End Too Late Alert
concepts.description: Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective because the end of administration is too close to another planned therapy

concepts.name: Food Interaction Alert
concepts.description: Proposed therapy may interact with certain foods

concepts.name: fulfillment alert
concepts.description: Definition:The therapy being performed is in some way out of alignment with the requested therapy.

concepts.name: held/suspended alert
concepts.description: Definition:There should be no actions taken in fulfillment of a request that has been held or suspended.

concepts.name: record recorded as historical
concepts.description: Description: While the record was accepted in the repository, there is a more recent version of a record of this type.

concepts.name: outside requested time
concepts.description: Definition:The therapy action is being performed outside the bounds of the time period requested

concepts.name: too soon within frequency based on the usage
concepts.enDisplayName: too soon within frequency based on the usage
concepts.description: Definition:The therapy action is being performed too soon after the previous occurrence based on the requested frequency

concepts.name: Natural Health Product Alert
concepts.frDisplayName: Alerte : interaction avec produit de santé naturel
concepts.description: Proposed therapy may interact with existing or recent natural health product therapy

concepts.name: Non-Prescription Interaction Alert
concepts.frDisplayName: Alerte : interaction avec produit sans ordonnance
concepts.description: Proposed therapy may interact with a non-prescription drug (e.g. alcohol, tobacco, Aspirin)

concepts.name: no longer actionable
concepts.description: Definition:The status of the request being fulfilled has changed such that it is no longer actionable. This may be because the request has expired, has already been completely fulfilled or has been otherwise stopped or disabled. (Not used for 'suspended' orders.)

concepts.name: not equivalent alert
concepts.description: Definition:The therapy being performed is not sufficiently equivalent to the therapy which was requested.

concepts.name: not generically equivalent alert
concepts.description: Definition:The therapy being performed is not generically equivalent (having the identical biological action) to the therapy which was requested.

concepts.name: not therapeutically equivalent alert
concepts.description: Definition:The therapy being performed is not therapeutically equivalent (having the same overall patient effect) to the therapy which was requested.

concepts.name: violates stated preferences
concepts.frDisplayName: Ne respecte pas les préférences au dossier
concepts.description: Definition:The proposed therapy goes against preferences or consent constraints recorded in the patient's record.

concepts.name: violates stated preferences, alternate available
concepts.frDisplayName: Ne respecte pas les préférences au dossier, option possible
concepts.description: Definition:The proposed therapy goes against preferences or consent constraints recorded in the patient's record. An alternate therapy meeting those constraints is available.

concepts.name: previously ineffective
concepts.description: Definition:The same or similar treatment has previously been attempted with the patient without achieving a positive effect.

concepts.name: Start Too Late Alert
concepts.description: Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective because the start of administration is too late after the onset of the condition

concepts.name: timing detected issue
concepts.description: Description:Proposed therapy may be inappropriate or ineffective based on the proposed start or end time.

concepts.name: event timing incorrect alert
concepts.description: Definition:The therapy is being performed at a time which diverges from the time the therapy was requested

concepts.name: Refill Too Late Alert
concepts.description: The patient is receiving a subsequent fill significantly later than would be expected based on the amount previously supplied and the therapy dosage instructions

concepts.name: Refill Too Soon Alert
concepts.description: The patient is receiving a subsequent fill significantly earlier than would be expected based on the amount previously supplied and the therapy dosage instructions

concepts.name: Therapeutic Product Alert
concepts.description: Proposed therapy may interact with an existing or recent therapeutic product
